risk_title: Security and Access Constraints in Former FATA Districts Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Implementation of revenue mobilization and public resource management activities in former Federally Administered Tribal Areas (FATA) and Provincially Administered Tribal Areas (PATA) faces potential security-related access constraints that may impede field operations, surveys, and service delivery.
evidence_quote: Conduct infrastructure survey based on inclusion and equity for Provincially Administered Tribal Areas and (PATA) and of former Federally Administered Tribal Areas (FATA) districts

risk_title: Governance Fragility Affecting Institutional Capacity and Coordination
risk_summary: Political and governance instability in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa is reflected in the downgrade of the Political and Governance risk rating from Substantial to Moderate, indicating ongoing fragility that may undermine inter-departmental coordination and sustained implementation of public resource management reforms.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance: Substantial (Approval Package - 13 Jun 2019) to Moderate (Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 08 - 11 Dec 2023)

risk_title: Stakeholder Engagement Challenges Affecting Program Sustainability
risk_summary: Stakeholder risk rating has declined from Substantial to Moderate, suggesting potential tensions or reduced buy-in from key government actors needed to sustain revenue mobilization and public resource management reforms across multiple departments.
evidence_quote: Stakeholders: Substantial (Approval Package - 13 Jun 2019) to Moderate (Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 08 - 11 Dec 2023)
